title: Mosvera Provider Capability Manifest
description: A provider adapter's machine-readable declaration of which canonical constructs it can represent and the lowering action for each (MEP-0003). The runtime validates a resolved composition against this manifest before compilation. A construct not listed is treated as 'unsupported'. Capability claims MUST NOT be silently inherited — each concrete adapter re-declares its manifest. SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0.

$schema.description: Identifies this document as a Mosvera capability manifest of a given version.

provider.description: The provider/adapter identifier this manifest describes (e.g. openai-gpt-image-1, bfl-flux-2-pro).

adapter_version.description: The adapter version this manifest corresponds to. Part of the determinism contract: compilation is a deterministic function of (composition, adapter version, manifest).

constructs.description: Map of canonical construct name (snake_case) to its lowering action and optional notes. A construct absent from this map is treated as 'unsupported'.

note.description: Human-readable explanation of an approximate/emulate mapping (e.g. 'quality:high -> steps=50, guidance=3.5'). Required when the action is approximate or emulate, so that loss is documented.
